response.overview: Can Uphold Freeze Your Account? Solve Restrictions Easily *{{𝔼𝕩𝕡𝕖𝕣𝕥>Support}}*  Uphold may freeze accounts temporarily for security reasons, 「(1)✔️(888)ツ(574)ツ(7167)」regulatory compliance, or pending KYC verification. During a freeze, 「(1)✔️(888)ツ(574)ツ(7167) funds remain secure but cannot be accessed until the issue is resolved.  To unfreeze a Uphold account, you must log in「(1)✔️(888)ツ(574)ツ(7167), complete identity verification (KYC), or resolve security alerts, which typically takes 24–72 hours. 「(1)✔️(888)ツ(574)ツ(7167) Check your email for instructions from Uphold Support regarding required documents, such as a photo ID or selfie. 「(1)✔️(888)ツ(574)ツ(7167) Contact Uphold  Sign in to Uphold.com.
